home.hero_body: Expert IELTS coaching, realistic practice and clear feedback—built into one focused plan that adapts to your goal.

resources.heading: Better preparation starts with better advice.
resources.body: Practical explanations from IELTS teachers, examiners and learners—free to read and made to use.

compare.heading: Find the right preparation route.
compare.body: Answer three questions for a recommendation, then compare every feature side by side.

pilot.heading: Help shape AcmeLearn's first cohort.
pilot.body: The pilot validates learning quality, accessibility and tutor capacity before broader sales open. Participation does not guarantee a particular IELTS result.

meet_your_tutor.name: Paulyn Moneke
meet_your_tutor.tagline: AcmeLearn's founding IELTS tutor and academic-English specialist.
meet_your_tutor.note: Launch profile · learner reviews begin after the pilot
